changes.description: Party Planner has been replaced by MeowConnect.
changes.details: The old Google Sheets and Apps Script based Party Planner has been removed from the app. MeowConnect is now the shared raid availability feature, focused on seeing who can still run selected raids with you.

changes.description: MeowConnect adds shared friend raid availability through Supabase.
changes.details: Users can connect with Discord, consent to sharing selected character data, add friends, and see raid availability through the cloud-hosted MeowGangConnect database.

changes.description: Raid Together view added for planning runs with friends.
changes.details: The MeowConnect overview now focuses on how many matching open runs you and each friend can still do for selected raids, with profile sections that can be expanded to inspect individual characters.

changes.description: MeowConnect logs show recent clear activity.
changes.details: The logs view can show clears from LOA Logs encounter data and manual completion status, including source labels so users can tell whether the clear came from LOA Logs or manual tracking.
Roster settings now include a MeowConnect toggle per character. Characters stay hidden from MeowConnect until the user explicitly enables them.

Raid settings can mark a character as reserved for static or friend runs per raid and difficulty. Static friends can be granted visibility into the reserved character while other friends only see that the character is reserved.

changes.description: MeowConnect settings were added to System Settings.
changes.details: Users can enable or disable MeowConnect locally and separately control real-time raid completion syncing with the cloud database.

changes.description: MeowConnect status is visible in the app header.
changes.details: The header now shows whether MeowConnect is active, connecting, offline, login required, or inactive. The status reacts to Supabase realtime connection events and sync failures.

changes.description: Raid availability now respects difficulty lockouts.
changes.details: If a character clears a raid on one difficulty, MeowConnect treats that character as locked for the raid instead of showing it as available for another difficulty of the same raid.

changes.description: Friend search and profile display were refined.
changes.details: The friend flow now uses a tighter settings UI, whitelist name preview, pending requests, profile avatars for users who have connected through MeowConnect, and local favorites for focusing important friends or characters.

changes.description: MeowConnect sync is throttled and event-driven.
changes.details: Character and completion data syncs on app start, after successful daily roster scraping, and after raid completions when real-time syncing is enabled. Manual sync remains available but is rate limited.

changes.description: Update release notes now render as formatted text.
changes.details: The update dialog now formats headings, bullet lists, paragraphs, and bold text from latest.json notes instead of showing the raw Markdown text.

changes.description: Legacy Party Planner code and Apps Script template were removed.
changes.details: The PartyPlan component, frontend Party Plan service, Tauri Party Plan commands, Rust handler module, Party Plan styles, and local Apps Script development template were removed. Existing party_plans.json files are now inert legacy data.

changes.description: MeowConnect database access is protected by Supabase RLS.
changes.details: Profiles, characters, completions, reservations, encounters, and friend connections use row-level security so users can write only their own data and read only their own or accepted friends' shared data.

changes.description: Favorites now apply per character instead of per profile.
changes.details: Marking one character as a favorite no longer marks every character from that same profile.

changes.description: MeowConnect can recover from old or disabled tab URLs.
changes.details: Opening an old Party Planner tab URL or disabled MeowConnect URL now redirects back to Dashboard instead of leaving the app on an empty view.
